story_title: Ted Turner, CNN founder, dies at 87
story_one_liner: Sixteen countries reported the same death. Five of them told you a different story about who Ted Turner actually was.
voice_style: calm-reflective, slower than the news-explainer pace
music_brief: muted melancholy strings, slow build, lift on scene 7
voiceover_provider: ElevenLabs Creator tier or Azure Neural TTS

scenes.voiceover: Ted Turner died yesterday at eighty-seven. Sixteen countries reported it. Five told you something different.
scenes.visual_brief: Cold open. Black-and-white file shot of Turner with his America's Cup yacht, dissolves into the CNN logo from 1980.

scenes.voiceover: He launched CNN in 1980. Married Jane Fonda. Owned the Atlanta Braves. Donated a billion dollars to the United Nations. He had the world's largest bison herd. So how do you tell that story?
scenes.visual_brief: Quick montage: CNN launch, Fonda wedding photo, Braves game, UN building, bison on grasslands. Each held 1.5s.

scenes.voiceover: Most of the world ran the wire. Bangkok Post, Globe and Mail, Al Jazeera: "the brash sportsman and entrepreneur whose ambition led to a media empire." Eight buckets, near-verbatim.
scenes.visual_brief: Newspaper headlines stack from multiple outlets, all saying essentially the same thing. Timestamp lower-third '2026-05-06'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🌏 'The brash sportsman'
8 outlets ran the wire copy
scenes.headline_quoted: CNN founder Ted Turner dead at 87 — Al Jazeera English / Bangkok Post / SCMP / Rappler

scenes.voiceover: Pakistan and Hungary made it personal. Geo News led with this: "His father was a volatile man who disciplined his son with a leather strap. He later shot himself in 1963, leaving twenty-four-year-old Ted in charge."
scenes.visual_brief: Pakistan and Hungary flag overlays. Black-and-white archive photo of young Turner. Direct quote card.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇵🇰 PAKISTAN: 'A difficult beginning'
Geo News English
scenes.headline_quoted: Ted Turner dies at 87: Everything to know about CNN founder's life, career, legacy — Geo News English

scenes.voiceover: Brazil's Carta Capital was the only outlet to name what CNN actually covered: "from the collapse of the Soviet Union to the Chinese crackdown on Tiananmen Square... CNN's decision to keep reporters in Baghdad amid US bombings in the early 1990s."
scenes.visual_brief: Brazilian flag overlay. Quick archive cuts: Soviet flag lowering, Tiananmen tank, Baghdad live shot. Held 1.5s each.
scenes.headline_quoted: Morre aos 87 anos Ted Turner, fundador da 'CNN' — Carta Capital

scenes.voiceover: And Trump's tribute. Most US wire ran it straight: "one of the Greats of All Time." The Independent, in London, read it differently.
scenes.visual_brief: Truth Social post styling for Trump's quote, then cut to The Independent's headline. Side-by-side framing.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇺🇸 USA: 'One of the Greats'
Trump on Truth Social

scenes.voiceover: The Independent's headline: "Trump pays tribute after Ted Turner death by taking a shot at CNN. 'Destroyed his baby.'"
scenes.visual_brief: Bold display of The Independent headline on a phone screen mockup. Slight zoom on 'taking a shot at CNN'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇬🇧 UK: 'A shot at CNN'
The Independent
scenes.headline_quoted: Trump pays tribute after Ted Turner death by taking a shot at CNN: 'Destroyed his baby' — The Independent

scenes.voiceover: One man. Five very different lives. Daily framings — follow.
scenes.visual_brief: Five flags fan into frame around Turner archive photo. End card.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Same man. Five lives.
Daily framings. Follow.

fact_check_provenance.primary_event_source: Turner Enterprises press release via CNN

supporting_quotes_per_frame.exact_headline: CNN founder Ted Turner dead at 87
Ted Turner dies at 87: Everything to know about CNN founder's life, career, legacy
Morre aos 87 anos Ted Turner, fundador da 'CNN'
CNN Founder Ted Turner Dies At 87
Trump pays tribute after Ted Turner death by taking a shot at CNN: 'Destroyed his baby'

fact_check_provenance.note: UK's contribution arrived via summary-fallback only (BBC and Independent body extraction failed) — confirms the value of the signal_text fallback architecture.
